info.name: EduTask Manager - Complete API Test Suite
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman Collection (v2.1) for the EduTask Manager platform.

Covers 79 endpoints across 11 modules:
- Authentication & User Profile
- Admin User Management
- Academic Year Management
- Task Lifecycle (CRUD, Subtasks, Comments, Attachments, Kanban)
- Schedule & Calendar
- Reminders
- Document Management
- Q&A Forum
- Discussion Management (Admin)
- Notifications
- Direct Messaging (Chat)

Authentication: JWT Bearer Token
Base URL: http://localhost:7860

Default credentials:
- Admin: admin / 123456
- Teacher: gv1 / 123456
- Student: sv1 / 123456

item.name: 01. Authentication & User Profile
item.description: Registration, Login, Logout, Profile, and Settings endpoints.

exec: pm.test("Has user", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("user"); });
pm.test("User created with student role", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.user.role).to.eql("student"); });
pm.test("Has token", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("token"); });
var d=pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set("auth_token", d.token); pm.collectionVariables.set("admin_token", d.token); pm.collectionVariables.set("current_user_id", d.user.id);
pm.test("Login returns user object", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.user).to.have.property("role"); });
pm.test("Returns error", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("error"); });
pm.test("Has user", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("user"); });

pm.test("Profile has required fields", function() { var u=pm.response.json().user; pm.expect(u).to.have.property("username"); pm.expect(u).to.have.property("email"); pm.expect(u).to.have.property("role"); });
pm.test("Has teachers", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("teachers"); });
pm.test("Has students", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("students"); });
pm.test("Settings updated", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.message).to.include("thành công"); });

item.name: 02. Admin - User Management
item.description: Admin-only endpoints for managing users, approvals, and system health.

exec: pm.test("Health has all services", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("database"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("storage"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("mail"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("api"); });
pm.test("Has users", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("users"); });
pm.test("Has total", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("total"); });
pm.test("Pagination fields present", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("pages"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("current_page"); });
pm.test("Has users", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("users"); });
pm.test("Has user", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("user"); });
pm.test("Has user", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("user"); });
pm.test("Returns is_active status", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("is_active"); });
pm.test("Returns is_approved status", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("is_approved"); });
pm.test("Has users", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("users"); });
pm.test("Has academic_year", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("academic_year"); });
pm.test("Has academic_years", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("academic_years"); });

item.name: 04. Task Management
item.description: Full CRUD for tasks, subtasks, comments, attachments, status updates, and request workflows.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Postman Test Task",
  "description": "Task created via Postman automation",
  "priority": "high",
  "due_date": "2026-04-03T10:48:36",
  "course_name": "Software Engineering",
  "course_code": "SE101",
  "class_group": "CNTT-01",
  "semester": "HK1",
  "academic_year": "2025-2026",
  "assignee_ids": [],
  "progress": 0,
  "estimated_time": "8h"
}

exec: pm.test("Has task", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("task"); });
pm.test("Has tasks", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("tasks"); });
pm.test("Has total", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("total"); });
pm.test("Pagination works", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.current_page).to.eql(1); });
pm.test("Has tasks", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("tasks"); });
pm.test("Has task", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("task"); });

pm.test("Task schema valid", function() { var t=pm.response.json().task; pm.expect(t).to.have.property("title"); pm.expect(t).to.have.property("status"); pm.expect(t).to.have.property("priority"); pm.expect(t).to.have.property("subtasks"); pm.expect(t).to.have.property("comments"); });
pm.test("Task updated", function() { var t=pm.response.json().task; pm.expect(t.title).to.eql("Updated Postman Task"); pm.expect(t.priority).to.eql("urgent"); });
pm.test("Has stats", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("stats"); });
pm.test("Has subtask", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("subtask"); });
pm.test("Has comment", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("comment"); });
pm.test("Has requests", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("requests"); });
var d=pm.response.json(); if(d.requests && d.requests.length > 0) { pm.collectionVariables.set("request_id", d.requests[0].id); }

item.name: 05. Schedule & Calendar

exec: pm.test("Has schedule", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("schedule"); });
pm.test("Has schedules", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("schedules"); });
pm.test("Has schedules", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("schedules"); });
pm.test("Has schedule", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("schedule"); });

pm.test("Schedule schema valid", function() { var s=pm.response.json().schedule; pm.expect(s).to.have.property("title"); pm.expect(s).to.have.property("start_time"); pm.expect(s).to.have.property("end_time"); });
pm.test("Has schedules", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("schedules"); });

item.name: 07. Document Management
item.description: Upload, search, download, and delete documents. Note: Upload requires form-data.

formdata.description: Select a file to upload (PDF, DOCX, etc.)

request.description: Upload a document. Requires a file in form-data.

item.name: 09. Admin - Discussion Management
item.description: Admin panel for managing Q&A discussions.

exec: pm.test("Has questions", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("questions"); });
pm.test("Has stats", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("stats"); });
pm.test("Stats present", function() { var s=pm.response.json().stats; pm.expect(s).to.have.property("total_questions"); pm.expect(s).to.have.property("active"); });
pm.test("Has notifications", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("notifications"); });
pm.test("Has unread_count", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("unread_count"); });
pm.test("Pagination present", function() { var d=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("total"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("page"); });
pm.test("Has unread_count", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("unread_count"); });
pm.test("Has notifications", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("notifications"); });

item.name: 11. Direct Messaging (Chat)
item.description: 1-1 chat contacts, conversations, and message sending.

exec: pm.test("Has contacts", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("contacts"); });
pm.test("Has chat_message", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("chat_message"); });
pm.test("Has messages", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("messages"); });
pm.test("Has recent", function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("recent"); });
